---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or a specific Pathfinder 1e mechanic to implement.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: jakob-hendrix
---

## Description

Is this a new UI feature, a new automation for a specific rule, or a character management tool?
(e.g., "Add a 'Buff' tracker for active spells like Haste.")

## Pathfinder 1e Rule Reference

If this is a mechanical feature, please link to the **Archives of Nethys** or cite the specific book and page number.

## UI/UX Mockup or Example Screenshots (Optional)

If you have a vision for how this should look in the MAUI desktop app, describe it or upload a rough sketch/screenshot.
